coverage_note: Comprehensive review: DB text compared byte-for-byte against authoritative PDF source (2025ND166.pdf) after stripping page furniture (form-feed 0x0C characters and page number headers). Opinion body ([¶1]–[¶18]) verified for substantive content, all citations, monetary amounts, party names, case names, and paragraph numbering. All high-risk elements (numbers, citations, names) individually verified against source. No OCR defects, split/join errors, or character substitutions detected. Caption formatting differs due to PDF multi-column layout vs. DB linearization, but substantive content is identical."

proposals.old_exact:
This Court affirmed, but for a different reason. Id. ¶ 15. the

[¶15] In affirming, we distinguished between whether test was "administered under" N.D.C.C. § 39-20-01 or N.D.C.C. § 39-20-01.1.

proposals.source: PDF pdftotext extraction shows 'whether the test was' with correct article; DB has orphaned 'the' at end of prior line and 'whether test was' in subsequent paragraph
proposals.note: Single error manifesting as: (1) stray 'the' at end of 'Id. ¶ 15.' and (2) missing article in 'whether test was'. Both corrections required to fix one ingestion defect. The word 'the' was inadvertently relocated during OCR/ingestion process.
